description_long: This object depicts a female police officer dressed in a dark navy blue patrol uniform, complete with a matching peaked cap. The uniform features a buttoned shirt with a visible badge on the left chest, shoulder patches, and a nameplate, paired with straight-cut pants and black shoes. A utility belt is equipped with several pouches and tools, including what appear to be handcuffs and other standard police gear. The officer's hair is dark and shoulder-length, visible beneath the cap. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of urban law enforcement personnel. The uniform is adorned with metallic and embroidered insignia, enhancing its official look.
description: A female police officer in a navy blue patrol uniform with a peaked cap, utility belt, and visible badge and insignia. The attire is professional and typical of urban law enforcement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, badge, nameplate, and full uniform details including the utility belt and cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, shoulder patch, and the side of the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, cap, and the utility belt's rear attachments.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the cap, shoulder patch, and the right side of the utility belt.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard urban police patrol uniform with a buttoned navy blue shirt, straight-cut navy pants, short sleeves, utility belt, and metallic insignia.
attribute_headgear_style: Navy blue peaked cap with a shiny black brim and metallic badge on the front.
